description_long: This is a modern, armless lounge chair with a gently curved, cushioned seat and backrest, upholstered in a muted brown fabric. The chair features a minimalist design with clean lines and a slightly reclined back for ergonomic comfort. Its seat and backrest are thickly padded, providing a plush and inviting appearance. The chair is supported by four short, sturdy wooden legs with a natural finish, slightly splayed for stability. The upholstery appears smooth and seamless, with subtle stitching along the edges for a refined look. This chair would fit well in urban parks, waiting areas, or contemporary indoor public spaces.
description: A modern, armless brown lounge chair with a cushioned seat and backrest, supported by four wooden legs and featuring a minimalist, comfortable design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, cushioned seat and the subtle curve of the backrest, with both front legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the reclined angle of the backrest and the thickness of the seat cushion, with two legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and the back legs, with the seat's depth visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same reclined backrest and seat profile as view 1, but from the other side.
